stories.headline: Merkel warns Europe can no longer rely on old security certainties
stories.summary: Former German Chancellor Angela Merkel was awarded the European Order of Merit on Tuesday. Merkel warned that Europe could no longer take peace and security for granted following Russia’s invasion of Ukraine. She also said changes in US security policy showed old certainties were fading.

stories.summary: Kevin Warsh is poised to take the helm of the US central bank later this week facing pressure from the White House to deliver interest-rate cuts and growing resolve from his colleagues to stand pat. Now the bond market is piling on.

stories.headline: Banks Start $6.2 Billion Warner Bros. Debt Cleanup Before Merger

stories.headline: Zak Brown On Racing’s Triple Crown
stories.summary:
McLaren CEO Zak Brown joined Bloomberg Open Interest to break down the team’s hunt for motorsport’s Triple Crown, why IndyCar still rewards elite driving talent, and how AI is changing Formula 1 strategy in real time. He also weighs in on controversial F1 regulations, fan growth, and the future of racing technology.
Correction: Corrects attribution of video used in show (Source: Bloomberg)
